name: Urban Supernatural Mystery
description: Preset Urban Supernatural Mystery with default tone, themes, and 3-arc structure.

text_areas.logline: Mundane crimes conceal breaches between worlds.
text_areas.setting: A modern city layered atop forgotten magical fault lines.
text_areas.main_objective: Close growing rifts while exposing the occult broker network.
text_areas.stakes: Rifts widen into citywide reality distortions.

arcs.name: Arc I — Inciting Pressure
arcs.objective: Establish allies and identify first leverage point.

arcs.name: Arc II — Escalation
arcs.summary: Opposition adapts and raises the cost.
arcs.objective: Disrupt enemy momentum and protect key assets.

arcs.name: Arc III — Final Turning Point
arcs.summary: The central conflict reaches decisive climax.
arcs.objective: Resolve the core threat and define long-term consequences.
